pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes these folder names into /home/ga/Desktop/planning_browser_spec.txt and verifier.py checks for them in EXPECTED_FOLDERS.
setup_task.sh writes font size 18 into the specification document and verifier.py checks if the default_font_size preference equals 18.
setup_task.sh instructs the download location to be /home/ga/Documents/Spatial_Data and verifier.py checks if 'spatial_data' is in the default_directory preference.
setup_task.sh specifies 'data.census.gov' and 'ejscreen.epa.gov/mapper' in the specification document and verifier.py checks for 'census.gov' and 'ejscreen.epa.gov' in startup_urls.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected browser data (Bookmarks, History, Cookies) for 35 distinct domains, created by a python script in setup_task.sh. The verified task requirements are to create 5 specific bookmark folders ('GIS & Maps', 'Demographics', 'Zoning & Code', 'Transportation', 'Public Engagement'), change the default font size to 18, set the download directory to 'Spatial_Data', and configure the startup domains to include 'data.census.gov' and 'ejscreen.epa.gov'. These requirements perfectly match the explicit instructions generated in the workspace and the verifier logic.
